response.justification: Bogdan brings 17+ years of broad software engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative through GISCollective, but falls well short of the director-level AI strategy profile this role demands. His AI exposure is recent and implementational — MCP tooling and agentic workflows beginning April 2025 — rather than the deep, recognized expertise in building and shipping AI platforms expected here. There is no evidence of strategic customer advisory work, cross-functional executive-level influence, or the kind of thought leadership that defines a Principal/Director IC in AI strategy. The role requires someone who has shaped AI product direction at scale; this candidate is a strong generalist senior engineer still building his AI foundations.
strengths: 17+ years of continuous engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — meets the minimum tenure threshold
Founded and shipped GISCollective, a real open-source geo-data platform with active users, demonstrating entrepreneurial execution beyond typical IC scope
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work, indicating a genuine pivot toward agentic AI tooling
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward), with no demonstrated history of building recognized AI products or platforms that could support a strategic advisory role

No evidence of director-level IC operating scope: no track record of advising enterprise customers on AI adoption, driving cross-organizational strategy, or shaping technical vision at executive altitude
No advanced degree in AI, ML, or a related field; educational background in Computer Science and Fine Arts does not support the preferred credentials for this highly specialized position

key_factors.factor: No strategic or advisory leadership track record
